changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_captured for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to audit logging, which is a key component of system configuration and privilege verification. The naming mostly follows conventions, but a minor change was made to improve consistency and clarity.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names use past tense for actions, e.g., 'captured' instead of 'captures'
title: Interview system administrators and examine system configurations and privileges to verify that o...
step1_reasoning: The control 10.3.1 focuses on verifying system configurations and privileges, particularly around logging and audit trails, which are directly applicable to Kubernetes through its audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture detailed events and retain them for compliance purposes, similar to cloud provider audit logging services.
